# centerTextProvider

**Instance Property**

The text to display in the center of the gauge.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var centerTextProvider: CLKTextProvider { get set }
```

## Discussion

This property supports multicolor text.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **bottomTextProvider**: The text to display at the bottom of the gauge.
- **gaugeProvider**: The gauge to display in the complication.
